name: io.github.ericlovold/sanction
description: Trust layer for autonomous agents: authorize spend against policy, inject vault secrets under short-lived scoped tokens, and track budgets — every action audited. Call before any purchase or credential access.

environmentVariables.name: SANCTION_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Agent API key (pxy_ prefix), issued per agent at registration.

environmentVariables.name: SANCTION_WALLET_ID
environmentVariables.description: Wallet id used by the read-only wallet-status tool.
